rulings.Case Title: KUNDAN WALKER-FISHER et al VS. VALERIE LEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defts To Comply With Pltfs' First Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents And For Related Relief
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 13, 2010, line 3. PLAINTIFFS KUNDAN WALKER-FISHER, KELLY WALKER-FISHER'S Motion To Compel Defendants To Comply With Plaintiffs' First Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents And For Related Relief is granted as to modified document request 9. Defendants shall produce documents as defendant suggested in their response to that request and also produce documents regarding construction of the second unit. Parties to meet and confer regarding document request 15. Defendant to produce post-tenancy documents. The parties must meet and confer regarding exactly which agency documents should be disclosed. The request for "all" municipal documents is overbroad. Motion granted as to modified document request 16 as written. Defendant to produce post-tenancy documents. Requests for sanctions denied. Both parties had substantial justification for their positions. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SCOTT DAVID ROBISON VS. CITGO PETROLEUM CORPORATION, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltf'S First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 13, 2010, line 10. DEFENDANT THE SHERWIN-WILLIAMS COMPANY'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint is granted without leave to amend as to page 10, lines 6-8 and 15-17 "and other chemical products the identities of which are presently unknown to plaintiffs, but which plaintiffs believe will be identified during further discovery." Plaintiffs may move to amend the complaint if other chemical products are later identified. Motion to strike denied in all other respects. 10 days leave to answer. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: CHIKA UGBAJA VS. HILLTOP FINANCIAL MORTGAGE INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-10-633653 WITH CASE CGC-10-502596
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 13, 2010, line 4. PLAINTIFF CHIKA UGBAJA'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-10-633653 WITH CASE CGC-10-502596 is denied. Plaintiff may seek an injunction to stay the eviction proceedings until trial of defendant's wrongful foreclosure sale action pursuant to C.C.P. section 526. See Asuncion v. The Superior Court of San Diego County (1990) 108 Cal App 3d 141, 146. =(302/CWW)
